infraPanel.serversDetail: Retakes, DM, ForFun, Duels, Wingman and Surf

premiumFaq.title: Frequently asked questions
premiumFaq.a1: Yes. Premium and Elite are monthly with no commitment. Access continues until the end of the paid period.
premiumFaq.q2: Does the reserved slot work on all servers?
premiumFaq.a2: Yes, on full public servers. Private Elite servers have their own rules.
premiumFaq.q3: Do skins work outside clutchclube servers?
premiumFaq.a3: No. Unlocked skins are cosmetics only within our server network.
premiumFaq.q4: Do I need the anticheat on the Free plan?
premiumFaq.a4: Not in casual modes (Deathmatch, Retakes, ForFun). The anticheat is required only in the ranked 5v5 queue, which also requires a Premium or Elite subscription.

anticheatPage.subtitle: Link your Steam, install the official anticheat and play ranked safely. Lightweight, secure and required only in 5v5 mode with ELO.
anticheatPage.steamRequiredDesc: The clutchclube anticheat requires a linked Steam account to install and validate on the servers.
anticheatPage.protect1Text: Real-time memory and behavior analysis to catch cheats before they affect your match.
anticheatPage.protect2Text: Minimal CPU and RAM usage. Runs in the background without impacting your FPS.
anticheatPage.protect3Text: We only collect what the anticheat needs. Your personal data is never accessed.
anticheatPage.protect4Text: Automatic bans and a clean queue. Play knowing everyone is on the same level.
anticheatPage.step1: Link your Steam account on clutchclube.
anticheatPage.step2: Download the clutchclube Anticheat installer for Windows.
anticheatPage.step3: Run the file and follow the installation wizard.
anticheatPage.step4: Restart your computer. Not needed in casual modes; in ranked, the anticheat validates when you hit GO.
anticheatPage.vacNote: VAC compatible. Does not cause Valve bans.

pageHeaders.lobbyDesc: Casual warmup — join open rooms managed by the system.
pageHeaders.warmupDesc: Deathmatch, Surf, Retake, KZ and more — connect directly to public servers.
pageHeaders.rankedDesc: 5v5 rooms — create or join a team and challenge other rooms (Premium or Elite).

pageHeaders.missionsDesc: Complete daily, weekly and monthly challenges to earn XP and coins.
pageHeaders.achievementsDesc: Unlock permanent medals for your competitive journey.
pageHeaders.battlePassDesc: Level up by playing and claim exclusive rewards every season.

pageHeaders.friendsDesc: Add friends, import from Steam and gift coins or items.
pageHeaders.matchDetailDesc: Round timeline, death heatmap, highlights and demo download.

pageHeaders.profileDesc: Edit your info, photo, account security and two-factor authentication.

pageHeaders.premiumDesc: Compare plans and upgrade to unlock all benefits.

pageHeaders.coinShopDesc: Buy coin packs and spend on exclusive skins, knives, agents and items.

pageHeaders.inventoryDesc: Equip knives, gloves, rifles and agents on clutchclube servers.

confirm.logoutDesc: You will be signed out and need to log in again to access the dashboard.
confirm.editProfileDesc: Your basic info will be updated on clutchclube.
confirm.enableMfaDesc: You'll need the authenticator app code when logging in on new devices.
confirm.disableMfaDesc: Your account will be less protected. We recommend keeping 2FA on.
confirm.changePasswordDesc: You'll need to sign in again on all connected devices.
confirm.removeAvatarDesc: Your photo will be removed and your name initials will be shown.
confirm.unlinkSteamDesc: You won't be able to play on the servers until you link a Steam account again.
confirm.switchSteamDesc: You'll be redirected to Steam to connect another account. The data already filled in this form will be kept.
confirm.useAnotherAccountDesc: You'll leave this session and can sign in or create a different account. The progress saved in this signup stays on this incomplete account.
confirm.markAllReadDesc: All notifications will be marked as read. This action cannot be undone.
confirm.connectServerDesc: You'll join {mode} mode. Counter-Strike: Global Offensive will start automatically (install CS:GO Legacy from your Steam library if needed).
confirm.joinQueueDesc: The server is full. You'll join the queue and be connected when a slot opens.
confirm.createLobbyRoomDesc: Your room will be visible in the lobby for other players to join. You can set map and mode later.
confirm.autoLobbyDesc: We found the best available room: {roomName} ({modeName}). You'll be connected automatically.
confirm.joinRankedQueueDesc: You'll search for a 5v5 ELO match. A Premium or Elite subscription is required.
confirm.leaveRankedQueueDesc: Your matchmaking search will be cancelled and you'll lose your place in the queue.
confirm.downloadAnticheatDesc: The installer will be downloaded to your computer. Requires Windows 10/11 and administrator permission.
confirm.subscribePremiumDesc: You'll be redirected to complete the subscription. Cancel anytime, no commitment.
confirm.purchaseItemDesc: Confirm the purchase of {price}. The item will be added to your inventory on clutchclube servers.
confirm.openSupportDesc: You'll be redirected to the selected support channel. Keep your account data safe.
confirm.equipSkinDesc: The skin will be applied on clutchclube servers. You can change it anytime in your inventory.
confirm.unequipSkinDesc: The weapon's default skin will return on the server after sync. You can equip another skin later.
confirm.quickConnectDesc: Quick Connect automatically picks the server with the best ping and occupancy for you.
confirm.rankedCancelMatchDesc: Ends this ranked match and frees your lobby. If there's a record on the CS:GO API, the match will also be cancelled there.
